description: Deep tail-out across a full-preset swap. A8_tail plays a long-decay tonal synth on every beat (free-running, rhythm 0 loops 0.5s); a swap to the empty TS2 is requested at 2.0s and commits at the next 2.5s loop point. The retired voice must ring out and decay smoothly across the commit (graded -50 → -64 → -89 dBFS over ~0.5s) rather than hard-cutting to silence, then fall silent. Complements TS_swap (short kick) with a longer tonal tail.

assertions.name: playing_before_swap
assertions.comment: the synth is hitting on every beat before the swap commits

assertions.name: tail_rings_after_commit
assertions.comment: just after the 2.5s commit the retired voice is still ringing (> -95 = not hard-cut) but quieter than the active hits (< -45 = committed, no longer triggering)

assertions.name: silent_after_tail
assertions.comment: once the tail has decayed the empty preset makes no sound
